verses.text: Israel min tawh a kilo, Judah sung panin a piangkhia, Topa' min tawh thu ciam napi-in, thuman thutak tawh Israel Pasian a pulaklo Jakob innkuan aw, hih thu ngai un
Note tua bang hinapi-in, khuapi siangtho sungah a teng mite ihi a, Israel Pasian i muang hi. Ama min pen Vanglian Topa ahi hi, ci-in kisaktheihna-in na neizaw lai uh hi
A masa lama nate thu tanglai-in ka gen a, keima kam panin tuate gingkhia-in ka kitheithangsak hi. Tua ciangin thakhat thu-in keimah in ka sem a, a hong piang hi
Note pen paupengin na ngawng uh sik thagui bang hi a, na thatang uh sumngo bangin a sakna thei khin ka hih manin

note in, “Ka milim un hihte bawl a, a kisui ka milim uh leh a kisung ka milim un thu pia hi,” na cih theihlohna dingun tanglai-a kipanin note tungah hih thute kong gen a, tuate hong pian' ma-in note tungah kong zasakkhol hi
Ka gensa thu khempeuh hong tungta ahih manin, na gennate a man hi, na hong cih ding uh hita hi. Tu-a kipanin na a thakte, na theih ngeiloh uh hong tung ding a ki-im nate kong gen ding hi
Hihte pen tuhunin a piangsak ka hi a, a beisa hunah hih bang piang nailo hi. A piang khinsa thu hi leh, ka theihsa uh thu hi, na ci khading uh hi
Note pen muan'theih ding na hihlohna uh, na suah tung uh-a kipan mi lehdo thei na hihna uh ka hong thei hi. Tua ahih manin hih thute na za ngei kei uh a, zong na thei ngei kei uh hi
Note khempeuh kong suksiat khaklohna dingin ka min ka ngaihsutna tawh ka hehna diahin, keimah hong kiphatna ka ngaihsutna-in note tungah ka ki-ip hi
Meikhuk sungah ngun a kisian'sak bangin gimna meikhuk sungah note kong ze-et hi. Ahi zongin note bangmahin a kimanglo na hihna uh hong kimu khin hi
Keimah ka kikhualna, keimah ka kingaihsutna-in hih bangin kong hih hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka min a siat ding kilawm ahi hiam? Midang khat tungah keima minthan'na ka pia kei ding hi.
Jakob aw, ka thu ngai in. Kong sap Israel-te aw, ka thu hong ngai un! Kei pen amah ka hi a, kei pen a masa hi-in, kei pen a nunung zong ka hi hi
Ka khut in leitung bulpi koih a, ka khut taklam in vantungte zal hi. Amaute ka sap ciangin amaute omkhawm pah uh hi

Note khempeuh hong kikhawm un la hong za un! Amaute sung panin kua in hih ka sep ding nate genkhol thei ahi hiam? Ka teelsa mipa in Babylon tungah keima ngimna sem ding a, Khaldea mite' langkhatah kei ka pang ding hi
Kei, keimah in thu genin amah ka sam a, kei in amah ka pan'pih a, amah a dau pai ding hi

Kei kiangah hong nai un la, hih thu hong za un. A kipat cila kipanin a simthamin thu ka gen ngei kei a, tua thu a pian'-a kipanin kei ka om hi. (Tu-in Topa Pasian in kei tungah a vangliatna hong pia a, kei hong sawl hi
Israel-te' Siangtho Pa, nangmah hong hon Topa in: Phattuamna na ngahna dingin nang a hong hilh, na zuih ding a kilawm lampi-ah a hong paipih Topa na Pasian ka hi hi
Ka thupiakna a ngai hi hoh leteh! Nangma nopsakna gunpi bang ding a, na thumanna, tuihualte tawh kibang ding hi
Na tu leh na tate sehnel zah pha ding a, na suanlekhakte sehnel vui zah pha ding hi. Keima mai-ah amaute' min kiphiatkhia lo ding a, kisusia ngeilo ding hi, a ci hi
Babylon panin paikhia-in Khaldea gam panin tai in la, lungdamna tawh hih thu genin taangko in la, leimong dongin puak in. “ Topa in ama nasem Jakob honkhia khinzo!” ci-in gen kawikawi in
Amah in sehnel gam kantanin amaute a paipih ciangin a dang uh taaklo hi. Suangpi panin amau-a' dingin amah in tui a luangsak hi. Amah in suangpi khangkhamsak a, tui a phulkhia hi
Tua ahih ciangin migilote-a' dingin nopna omlo hi, Topa in ci hi.
